HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAFFEI, CYNTHIA POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: 2006 CHRYSLER PT CRUISER - PROPERTY VALUE $ 6,000.00 OR $ 6,525.00 , SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $10,677.59 DAMAGES, $1,400.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $545.00 COSTS, $1,230.00 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,852.59, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
